data.title: 国际服千禧年歌单「A Night at Millennium」
data.summary: [‘A Night at Millennium’ Playlist Released!] Sensei! 'A Night at Millennium' playlist is now availab
data.body:
[‘A Night at Millennium’ Playlist Released!]

Sensei!
'A Night at Millennium' playlist is now available!
Check it out along with a charming video featuring Yuuka, Koyuki, and Noa spending a cozy night at Millennium!

➡️Details: https://youtu.be/Jvpcb0kPdQ8
